text: Ok it looks bad as far as the establishment. The food though incredible!!! The veggies are fresh and I am not sure what the do to there onions but FABULOUS!!!! I being a  big meat eater could have eaten about 5 pounds of there veggies! The Guacamole also fresh was very tasty! Can't wait to eat there again!
